name: Best Antipasto
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Cucumbers or 2 24 oz. dill pickles
2 lb Green beans or 4 15 oz. cans
2 lb Pickling onions or 3 16 oz. jars
3 lb Mushrooms or 5 10 oz. cans mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil cauliflower for 3 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. Peel pickling onions and cut cucumbers into slices.
3. Bring green beans to a boil until tender. Set all vegetables aside.
4. In a large pot, fry sliced mushrooms in oil over medium heat.
5. Add ketchup, boiled green beans, and red peppers to the pot.
6. Simmer for 10-15 minutes.
7. Add all remaining vegetables (olives), olives, anchovies, and tuna fish to the pot.
8. Simmer for another 12 minutes.
